'''Zexx''' were a gray-skinned species, featuring cone-like heads and long tusks. They were aggressive and unintelligent. It is possible they were related to the [[Esoomian/Legends|Esoomians]].<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|371|Zexx}}</ref>

They were indigenous to [[Prazhi]] in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]. Zexx were often found acting as pirates or mercenaries for [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] crime lords. Individuals of the race included [[Fnnbu]].

The Zexx tusks were strong and sharp enough to cut through living tissue. Their culture attached much importance to concepts of ownership and property, and they reacted violently to "borrowing" objects without permission.

*[[Tales of the Jedi (audio drama)|''Tales of the Jedi'' audio drama]]
*[[Tales of the Jedi 5|''Tales of the Jedi'' 5]] {{1st}}
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Fury]]'' {{Mo}}
